title: Support-Boundary Diagnostic for Tabular-Neural Reinforcement Learning: Reproducibility Artifact
description: Code, exact-step results, relative-reliability and fuzzy arbitration studies, state-accessible and sensorized Crazyflie UAV software-in-the-loop validation, support and cost metrics, compact and MiniGrid validation, and integrity audits for a soft-computing boundary analysis.

creators.name: Erkalkan, Ercan
creators.affiliation: Vocational School of Technical Sciences, Department of Electronics and Automation, Artificial Intelligence Operator Program, Marmara University
